cause_analysis.narrative: Divine Threading & Lash Studio - Anthem churned on 2026-03-28 after 285 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-16 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-16 via app_chat. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
